{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/96334924?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/redyank", "id": 96334924, "login": "redyank", "node_id": "U_kgDOBb30TA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/redyank", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59923", "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary An XSS vulnerability in Mistune allows bypassing of safe_url() protections via percent-encoded javascript URIs. ### Details The vulnerability exists in HTMLRenderer.safe_url() in Mistune. The function is intended to block harmful URL schemes such as "javascript:" by checking the prefix of the provided URL: _url = url.lower() if _url.startswith(self.HARMFUL_PROTOCOLS): return "#harmful-link" However, the input URL is not URL-decoded before this check. Because of this, an attacker can use percent-encoding to bypass the filter. For example: javascript%3Aalert(1) Since "%3A" is not decoded to ":", the check does not detect the "javascript:" scheme. When rendered in a browser, the URL is decoded, resulting in execution of arbitrary JavaScript upon user interaction. This effectively bypasses Mistune's built-in safe_url() protection mechanism. ### PoC 1. Install vulnerable version: pip install mistune==3.2.0 2. Run the following code: import mistune markdown = mistune.create_markdown() html = markdown("[j](javascript%3Aalert(1))") print(html) 3. Output:

j

4. Open the rendered HTML in a browser and click the link. 5. The browser decodes "%3A" into ":" and executes: javascript:alert(1) ### Impact This is a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability. An attacker can craft a malicious Markdown link that executes JavaScript in the victim's browser when clicked. Impact includes: - Session hijacking (e.g., cookie theft) - Execution of arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's context - Potential account takeover depending on the application This affects any application that renders user-controlled Markdown using Mistune without additional URL sanitization.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00199, "percentile": 0.09895}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T21:32:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59923"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T17:17:27Z", "published_at": "2026-07-20T21:32:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/lepture/mistune/security/advisories/GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59923", "https://github.com/lepture/mistune/commit/c7101fcbb6e8790e8e39157c5ca2238fc6dd6cbc", "https://github.com/lepture/mistune/releases/tag/v3.3.0", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/mistune/PYSEC-2026-2211.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/lepture/mistune/security-advisories/GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/lepture/mistune", "summary": "Mistune: XSS via percent-encoded javascript URI bypass in safe_url()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T21:32:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c25-4j27-2rv3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "mistune"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.3.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Mistune: XSS via percent-encoded javascript URI bypass in safe_url()
